meta.title: Maxime Tamburrini — Frontend Developer
meta.description: Multi-framework frontend developer (React, Vue, Svelte). Product thinking, design sensibility, rigorous execution.

hero.name: Maxime Tamburrini
hero.title: Frontend Developer
hero.tagline: Builds with the product, the user, and the business in mind.
hero.availability: Open to new opportunities · Remote / Europe

about.short: Multi-framework frontend developer. Before code, 10 years in music and film — sound engineer with IMDB credits. That cross-disciplinary background shapes how I approach every project: with product and business thinking, not just technical execution.
paragraphs: Before code, I spent 15 years in music — as a drummer and sound engineer in film post-production. I worked in hospitality, lived across multiple countries, and learned four languages. Each chapter taught me how to navigate complex systems, collaborate with diverse profiles, and deliver tangible results under real constraints.

When I transitioned into development, I carried that mindset forward: understand the context before writing code, think product before feature. I'm not a pure executor. I'm someone who understands a business, identifies what it needs, and builds it — from visual identity to frontend architecture.

I helped a restaurateur go from zero to €250,000 in revenue by designing his entire brand and digital presence. I built the website for a music production agency whose clients include Balenciaga, Disneyland Paris, and Warner Music.
What I bring: cross-disciplinary vision, rigorous execution, and the ability to bridge the gap between technology, design, and strategy.

experience.description: Enterprise clients (Heineken, Michelin, Bosch). Design system with Storybook, e2e testing, frontend architecture. B2B2C app built from scratch, Django → Vue.js migration, Pinia state management, Chart.js dataviz.
Direct clients, end-to-end ownership: requirements gathering, design, mockups, development and deployment. React, Next.js, Vue, Svelte.
10 React projects presented to a jury. Montpellier Hackathon 2023 — app shipped in 24h.
Sound post-production for film and audiovisual. IMDB credited. 10-year international career across music, sound, hospitality, 4 countries.

projects.name: thepause.app
projects.description: Meditation app — personal project, fully designed and developed, live in production.

projects.name: Calcul TJM
projects.description: Freelance revenue simulator: real-time comparison of French business structures (micro, SASU, EURL).

projects.name: Polishable
projects.description: Browser extension for shipping web apps: screenshots, icons and PWA analysis.

caseStudies.title: From zero to €250k revenue: full branding & digital presence for an artisan food truck
caseStudies.context: A pizzaiolo launching a wood-fired pizza truck in Villeneuve-lès-Maguelone with zero existing presence.
caseStudies.role: End-to-end ownership of brand identity and digital presence. Sole contributor.
deliverables: Print materials (flyers, business cards, loyalty card, stamp)
Website built with Next.js + TailwindCSS + Vercel

caseStudies.title: Bilingual showcase website for an audiovisual production agency working with international brands
caseStudies.context: A music and audiovisual production agency with credits including Balenciaga, Canal+, Disneyland Paris, Coca-Cola, Warner Music France, Citroën, Puy du Fou, FFF, and Crédit Agricole.
caseStudies.role: Full ownership from artistic direction to deployment — design, development, and delivery.
deliverables: Bilingual FR/EN website with Next.js + Vercel

results.value: Balenciaga, Canal+, Disneyland Paris, Coca-Cola, Warner Music, Citroën...
Client autonomous — Webflow migration, opened own production studios
